zh.lifeSummary: 當John Yorke於1530年11月27日出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾納希比時，他的父親Thomas Yorke30歲，母親Emma "Emily" Self25歲。他於1562年與Agnes Ulinskas在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾納希比結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1607年9月16日在他的家鄉享年76歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾納希比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Yorke于1530年11月27日出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾納希比时，他的父亲Thomas Yorke30岁，母亲Emma "Emily" Self25岁。他于1562年与Agnes Ulinskas在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾納希比结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1607年9月16日在他的家乡享年76岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾納希比。

variants.name: York
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of York in northern England. The surname is now widespread throughout England. Originally, the city bore the Latin name Eburacum, which is probably from a Brittonic name meaning ‘yew-tree place’. This was altered by folk etymology to Old English Eoforwīc (from the elements eofor ‘wild boar’ + wīc ‘specialized farmstead’). This name was taken over by Scandinavian settlers, who altered it back to opacity in the form Jórvík or Jórk (English York, which became finally settled as the placename in the 13th century). The surname has also been adopted by Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of the East Slavic patronymic   Yurkovich   or its Croatian, Slovak, or Slovenian variants. Compare   Yurk  .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When John Yorke was born on 27 November 1530, in Naseby, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Thomas Yorke, was 30 and his mother, Emma "Emily" Self, was 25. He married Agnes Ulinskas in 1562, in Naseby, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 16 September 1607, in his hometown, at the age of 76, and was buried in Naseby, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Yorke est né le 27 novembre 1530, à Naseby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Yorke, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Emma "Emily" Self, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Ulinskas en 1562, à Naseby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 16 septembre 1607, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Naseby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Yorke am 27. November 1530 in Naseby, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Yorke 30 und seine Mutter Emma "Emily" Self 25. Er hat 1562 in Naseby, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Ulinskas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 16. September 1607 im Alter von 76 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Naseby, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Yorke è nato il il 27 novembre 1530 nel Naseby, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Yorke, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Emma "Emily" Self, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Ulinskas nel 1562, nel Naseby, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 16 settembre 1607, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Naseby, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Yorkeが1530年11月27日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアナセビーで生まれた時，父Thomas Yorkeは30歳，母Emma "Emily" Selfは25歳であった。1562年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアナセビーでAgnes Ulinskasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1607年9月16日に故郷で76歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアナセビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Yorke(이)가 1530년 11월 27일 영국 노르섬프토실르 나세비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Yorke(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma "Emily" Self(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1562년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 나세비에서 Agnes Ulinskas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1607년 9월 16일 그의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 나세비에 묻혔다.

pt.27 November 1530–16 September 1607: 27 de novembro de 1530–16 de setembro de 1607
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Yorke nasceu em 27 de novembro de 1530, em Naseby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Yorke, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Emma "Emily" Self, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Ulinskas em 1562, em Naseby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de setembro de 1607, em sua cidade natal, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Naseby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Yorke родился 27 ноября 1530 г. в местности неисеби, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Yorke было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma "Emily" Self, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Ulinskas в 1562 г. в местности неисеби, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 16 сентября 1607 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности неисеби, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.27 November 1530–16 September 1607: 27 de noviembre de 1530–16 de septiembre de 1607
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Yorke nació el 27 de noviembre de 1530, en Naseby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Yorke, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Emma "Emily" Self, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Agnes Ulinskas en 1562, en Naseby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 16 de septiembre de 1607, en su pueblo, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Naseby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
